---
title: "Testing likelihoods"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Testing likelihoods}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This developer article will document simulation recovery tests, boundary-case
tests, and TMB likelihood review practices.

The current planning reference is `docs/design/05-testing-strategy.md`.
